name: github-release-notes
description: Custom MCP tool for GitHub: getLatestRelease returns a repo's latest release notes.

tools.name: getLatestRelease
tools.description: Returns a GitHub repo's latest release (tag, title, published date, notes). Pass `repo` as 'owner/name'. Self-contained: if that repo's releases page isn't open it returns {status:"navigate_required", navigateTo}.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
